chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-190 of 2021. Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For Orders on MA No. 1737/2021. (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of MA No. 1738/2021 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of main case. 29-03-2019. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar advocate for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the detenue is illegal confined by the private respondents within the jurisdiction of District Rahim Yar Khan Province of Panjab. If it is so, then it is outside of criminal appellate jurisdiction of this Court. The instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 491 Cr.P.C is dismissed along with listed applications with direction to the applicant to approach the Court having jurisdiction. Judge Nasim/P.A
